sector: Apparel Design, Pattern Making & Fashion Technology

questions.question: Garment export business mein merchandiser ka main role kya hai?

options.A: Buyer aur production team ke beech coordination karna.
options.B: Factory mein stitching karna.
options.C: Garments ki packing karna.

questions.explanation: Merchandiser ka primary role buyer aur internal production/sourcing teams ke beech communication aur coordination maintain karna hota hai.

questions.question: Ek export house mein, production plan banane ki responsibility generally kis department ki hoti hai?

options.B: Accounts Department
options.C: PPC Department

questions.explanation: PPC (Production Planning and Control) Department production activities ko plan aur control karta hai.

questions.question: Buyer se order milne ke baad, pehla step kya hota hai jo merchandiser ko lena chahiye?

options.B: Order details aur Tech Pack ko carefully review karna.
options.C: Final invoice generate karna.

questions.explanation: Order milne ke baad, merchandiser ko sabse pehle buyer ke order details aur Tech Pack ko thoroughly review karna chahiye taaki koi discrepancy na ho.

questions.question: Garment export mein 'Lead Time' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Factory mein kaam karne wale workers ki sankhya.
options.B: Buyer ko sample bhejne ka samay.
options.C: Order place hone se lekar goods dispatch hone tak ka total time.

questions.explanation: Lead Time woh total samay hota hai jo order confirmation se lekar final goods ke dispatch tak lagta hai.

questions.question: Ek merchandiser ke liye kaun si skill sabse zyada important hai?

options.B: Strong communication aur negotiation skills.
options.C: Heavy machinery operate karna.

questions.explanation: Merchandiser ko buyers aur suppliers ke saath deal karna hota hai, isliye strong communication aur negotiation skills bahut zaroori hain.

questions.question: FOB (Free On Board) Incoterm ka kya significance hai garment export mein?

options.A: Seller freight cost bear karta hai jab tak goods buyer ke warehouse tak na pahunch jaaye.
options.B: Seller goods ko specified port of shipment par ship tak deliver karne tak ki responsibility leta hai.
options.C: Buyer saare costs aur risks bear karta hai factory se hi.
options.D: Goods ki quality control ki responsibility buyer ki hoti hai.

questions.explanation: FOB mein, seller ki responsibility tab tak hoti hai jab tak goods designated port of shipment par vessel ke board par na aa jaaye. Uske baad saare risks aur costs buyer ke hote hain.

questions.question: Garment industry mein 'Tech Pack' kya hota hai?

options.A: Ek software jo stitching machine control karta hai.
options.B: Detailed document jismein garment style, measurements, materials aur construction instructions hote hain.
options.C: Fabric testing ke liye use hone wala ek device.
options.D: Packing ke liye use hone wala ek box.

questions.explanation: Tech Pack ek comprehensive document hota hai jo garment production ke liye saari technical details provide karta hai.

questions.question: Garment export mein 'Sampling' ka kya purpose hai?

options.A: Buyer ko final quantity mein garments deliver karna.
options.B: Production se pehle garment ke design, fit aur quality ko approve karwana.
options.C: Factory mein workers ki training karna.

questions.explanation: Sampling buyer ko production se pehle garment ka physical representation provide karta hai taaki design, fit aur quality approve ho sake.

questions.question: Ek merchandiser ko 'Time and Action (T&A) Calendar' ki zaroorat kyon padti hai?

options.A: Apni personal meetings schedule karne ke liye.
options.B: Order ke har step ko track karne aur deadlines meet karne ke liye.
options.C: Buyer ko payment remind karne ke liye.
options.D: Factory mein workers ki attendance record karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: T&A Calendar ek critical tool hai jo order ke har milestone aur uski deadline ko track karta hai, taaki production aur delivery time par ho sake.

questions.question: Garment export mein 'Bill of Material (BOM)' kis liye use hota hai?

options.A: Workers ki salary calculate karne ke liye.
options.B: Ek garment banane ke liye required saare fabrics aur trims ki list aur unki quantity.
options.C: Factory ka electricity bill pay karne ke liye.
options.D: Buyer ko final invoice bhejne ke liye.

questions.explanation: BOM ek detailed list hoti hai jismein ek garment banane ke liye zaroori saare raw materials (fabric, trims, accessories) aur unki specific quantities mention hoti hain.

questions.question: Export documentation mein 'Commercial Invoice' ka kya role hai?

options.A: Yeh ek request letter hai buyer se.
options.B: Yeh goods ki sale ka proof hai aur uski value, quantity aur other details batata hai.
options.C: Yeh factory ka internal record hai.
options.D: Yeh shipping company ko payment karne ka proof hai.

questions.explanation: Commercial Invoice ek legal document hai jo seller buyer ko deta hai, jismein exported goods ki details aur unki value mention hoti hai.

questions.question: Garment export mein 'Quality Control (QC)' ka primary goal kya hai?

options.B: Garments mein defects minimize karna aur buyer ke standards meet karna.
options.C: Workers ki productivity badhana.

questions.explanation: QC ka main aim yeh ensure karna hai ki products buyer ki specifications aur quality standards ko meet karein, defects ko minimize karte hue.

questions.question: Jab ek merchandiser buyer ke saath order details discuss karta hai, toh kis cheez par sabse zyada focus karna chahiye?

options.B: Clear communication of specifications, deadlines, aur pricing.
options.C: Apne favorite movies ke baare mein.
options.D: Factory mein workers ke personal issues.

questions.explanation: Effective communication of all critical order details (specifications, deadlines, pricing) is vital to avoid misunderstandings.

questions.question: Garment export mein 'Social Compliance' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Factory ke employees ko party dena.
options.B: Ethical labour practices, working conditions aur environmental standards ko follow karna.
options.C: Buyer ko gifts dena.

questions.explanation: Social Compliance ka matlab hai ki factory labour laws, human rights aur environmental regulations ko follow kare.

questions.question: Ek successful merchandiser banane ke liye, industry trends ke baare mein informed rehna kyon important hai?

options.A: Taaki fashion shows attend kar sakein.
options.B: Taaki buyer ko latest designs aur fabrics suggest kar sakein aur competitive reh sakein.
options.C: Taaki apne colleagues ko impress kar sakein.
options.D: Iska koi khaas fayda nahi hai.

questions.explanation: Industry trends ki knowledge merchandiser ko buyer ko relevant suggestions dene aur market mein competitive edge maintain karne mein help karti hai.

questions.question: Garment export mein 'Costing' ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.B: Garment banane mein kitna kharcha aayega aur us par profit margin add karke selling price decide karna.
options.C: Garment ki packing ka tareeka decide karna.

questions.explanation: Costing ka main aim hai garment ki production cost calculate karna aur usme desired profit margin add karke selling price determine karna.

questions.question: Export house mein 'Sampling Department' ka main kaam kya hai?

options.B: Buyer ke approval ke liye prototypes aur samples develop karna.
options.C: Final products ki quality check karna.

questions.explanation: Sampling Department ka kaam hai buyer ke specifications ke according different types ke samples (proto, fit, size set, PP) banana aur unka approval lena.

questions.question: Buyer se Tech Pack milne ke baad, merchandiser ka sabse pehla sourcing-related task kya hota hai?

options.B: Required fabric aur trims ki identification aur availability check karna.
options.C: Stitching machines purchase karna.

questions.explanation: Tech Pack review karne ke baad, merchandiser ko pehle required materials (fabric, trims) ko identify karna hota hai aur unki market availability aur pricing check karni hoti hai.

questions.question: Garment production mein 'Fabric Consumption' calculate karna kyon important hai?

options.A: Factory ka electricity bill calculate karne ke liye.
options.B: Required fabric quantity determine karne aur costing ke liye.
options.C: Workers ki salary calculate karne ke liye.
options.D: Shipping container ka size decide karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Fabric consumption se pata chalta hai ki ek garment banane mein kitna fabric lagega, jo costing aur fabric ordering ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: 'Proforma Invoice' ka kya role hai order processing mein?

options.A: Yeh final payment ka proof hai.
options.B: Yeh ek estimated bill hai jo buyer ko goods ki details aur price confirm karne ke liye bheja jata hai.
options.C: Yeh shipping document hai.
options.D: Yeh factory ka internal document hai.

questions.explanation: Proforma Invoice ek preliminary bill of sale hai jo buyer ko goods ke details, quantity, aur price ka estimate deta hai, order confirmation se pehle.

questions.question: Jab buyer 'Proto Sample' mangta hai, toh uska main purpose kya hota hai?

options.B: Garment ke initial design aur construction ko evaluate karna.
options.C: Final production quality check karna.

questions.explanation: Proto Sample initial design concept aur construction ko buyer se approve karwane ke liye banaya jata hai.

questions.question: Trims sourcing karte samay, merchandiser ko kin factors par dhyan dena chahiye?

options.B: Quality, lead time, price aur compliance certifications.
options.C: Supplier ki location.

questions.explanation: Trims sourcing mein quality, lead time, price aur supplier ki certifications (jaise REACH, Oeko-Tex) sabhi important factors hain.

questions.question: 'Fabric Swatch' kyon bheja jata hai buyer ko?

options.B: Fabric ka texture, color aur hand-feel approve karwane ke liye.
options.C: Costing confirm karne ke liye.
options.D: Shipping method decide karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Fabric swatch fabric ke physical attributes ko buyer se approve karwane ke liye bheja jata hai.

questions.question: Garment export mein 'Vendor Selection' ke liye kaun sa criterion sabse important hai?

options.B: Supplier ki reliability, quality consistency aur delivery capabilities.
options.C: Supplier ki factory ka size.
options.D: Supplier ka personal relationship merchandiser ke saath.

questions.explanation: Reliability, consistent quality, aur on-time delivery capabilities ek good vendor select karne ke liye key factors hain.

questions.question: Agar buyer 'Lab Dip' approval mangta hai, toh uski kya zaroorat hoti hai?

options.B: Fabric ke exact color shade ko approve karna.
options.C: Garment ka fit check karna.

questions.explanation: Lab Dip fabric ke specific color shade ko buyer se approve karwane ke liye submit kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Sourcing mein 'Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ)' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Ek factory mein minimum workers ki sankhya.
options.B: Supplier se purchase karne wali material ki sabse kam quantity.
options.C: Minimum time jo order complete karne mein lagega.
options.D: Minimum price jo buyer pay karega.

questions.explanation: MOQ woh minimum quantity hoti hai jo supplier accept karta hai order ke liye.

questions.question: Merchandiser ko 'Purchase Order (PO)' details check karte samay kin points par focus karna chahiye?

options.B: Quantity, size break-up, delivery date, pricing aur payment terms.
options.C: Buyer ka personal address.

questions.explanation: PO mein quantity, size break-up, delivery date, pricing, payment terms, aur other critical specifications ko carefully verify karna chahiye.

questions.question: Agar fabric supplier delay karta hai, toh merchandiser ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Buyer ko immediately inform kare aur alternative solutions explore kare.
options.C: Apne kaam se koi matlab nahi rakhna chahiye.
options.D: Factory mein stitching start kar deni chahiye.

questions.explanation: Delays ko immediately buyer ko communicate karna aur possible solutions (jaise air freight fabric, production re-scheduling) find karna merchandiser ki responsibility hai.

questions.question: Garment export mein 'Fit Sample' kyon banaya jata hai?

options.A: Fabric ka color check karne ke liye.
options.B: Garment ki fitting aur measurements ko approve karwane ke liye.
options.C: Packing material check karne ke liye.
options.D: Supplier ki pricing confirm karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Fit Sample garment ki actual fitting aur measurements ko buyer se approve karwane ke liye banaya jata hai.

questions.question: 'Trim Card' ka kya use hai sourcing mein?

options.B: Ek physical board jismein saare approved trims attached hote hain for reference.
options.C: Payment card.

questions.explanation: Trim Card ek reference board hota hai jismein ek particular garment style ke saare approved trims (buttons, labels, zippers, etc.) physically attached hote hain taaki production mein koi galti na ho.

questions.question: Sourcing ke dauran 'Price Negotiation' kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Supplier ko pareshaan karne ke liye.
options.B: Best possible price obtain karne aur order ki profitability maintain karne ke liye.
options.C: Time waste karne ke liye.
options.D: Sirf sabse sasta option choose karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Price negotiation se merchandiser order ke liye best possible cost achieve kar sakta hai, jo overall profitability ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Agar buyer 'PP Sample' (Pre-Production Sample) reject kar deta hai, toh merchandiser ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Directly bulk production start kar deni chahiye.
options.B: Buyer ke comments ko understand kare, corrective actions le aur revised sample submit kare.
options.C: Order cancel kar dena chahiye.
options.D: Buyer se aur samples ki request kare.

questions.explanation: PP Sample rejection par merchandiser ko buyer ke feedback ko detail mein analyze karna hota hai, production team ke saath collaborate karke issues resolve karne hote hain, aur phir revised sample submit karna hota hai.

questions.question: Garment export mein 'Fabric Booking' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Required fabric ko supplier se reserve karwana ya order place karna.
options.C: Fabric ko library mein rakhna.
options.D: Fabric ko ek diary mein likhna.

questions.explanation: Fabric Booking ka matlab hai production ke liye zaroori fabric ko supplier ke paas reserve karwana ya uske liye PO place karna.

questions.question: Sourcing ke dauran, 'testing requirements' ko check karna kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf buyer ko impress karne ke liye.
options.B: Yeh ensure karne ke liye ki fabrics aur trims required quality aur safety standards ko meet karte hain.
options.C: Testing labs ko support karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Testing requirements ko check karna bahut important hai taaki yeh ensure ho sake ki materials buyer ke quality, safety, aur performance standards (jaise colorfastness, shrinkage, harmful chemicals) ko meet karte hain.

questions.question: PPC (Production Planning and Control) Department ka main objective kya hai?

options.B: Efficient production flow ensure karna aur deadlines meet karna.
options.C: New designs create karna.

questions.explanation: PPC ka main aim hai production process ko effectively plan aur control karna taaki orders time par aur efficient tareeke se complete ho sakein.

questions.question: 'Capacity Planning' ka kya matlab hai garment manufacturing mein?

options.A: Factory ke storage capacity ko measure karna.
options.B: Factory ki production capability ko assess karna, kitne garments ek particular time mein ban sakte hain.
options.C: Workers ki drinking water capacity check karna.
options.D: Shipping container ki capacity calculate karna.

questions.explanation: Capacity Planning factory ki production capability ko determine karta hai, jismein machines, manpower aur space ki availability ko consider kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Production shuru hone se pehle 'Pattern Making' kyon zaroori hai?

options.B: Garment ke various parts ko exact shape aur size mein cut karne ke liye guide provide karna.
options.C: Fabric ka color decide karne ke liye.
options.D: Stitching machines ko calibrate karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Patterns garment ke har component ke liye template provide karte hain, jo precise cutting aur stitching ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: 'Marker Making' ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.B: Fabric waste minimize karte hue patterns ko efficiently arrange karna.
options.C: Garments ko label karna.

questions.explanation: Marker making ek layout hai jismein garment ke patterns ko fabric par is tarah arrange kiya jata hai ki fabric ki wastage kam se kam ho.

questions.question: Cutting Department mein 'Spreading' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Fabric ko floor par spread karna.
options.B: Fabric layers ko cutting table par evenly aur smoothly spread karna.
options.C: Garments ko sukhane ke liye spread karna.

questions.explanation: Spreading process mein fabric ke multiple layers ko cutting table par accurately aur tension-free tarike se bichaya jata hai cutting ke liye.

questions.question: Garment production mein 'Line Balancing' kyon important hai?

options.B: Har operation par work load evenly distribute karna taaki bottlenecks na bane aur efficiency badhe.
options.C: Workers ko yoga sikhana.

questions.explanation: Line Balancing ka aim hai har stitching operation par work load ko optimize karna taaki production flow smooth rahe aur koi particular station overload na ho.

questions.question: Agar merchandiser ko production mein delay ka pata chalta hai, toh use kya action lena chahiye?

options.A: Delay ko ignore kar dena chahiye.
options.B: Buyer ko immediately inform kare aur revised T&A calendar share kare.
options.C: Production team ko blame karna chahiye.
options.D: Apni chutti par chale jana chahiye.

questions.explanation: Delays ko transparently communicate karna aur revised plan share karna buyer relationship aur order management ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: 'In-house production' aur 'subcontracting' mein kya antar hai?

options.B: In-house mein kaam apni factory mein hota hai, subcontracting mein kaam doosri factory ko outsource kiya jata hai.
options.C: In-house mein payment cash mein hoti hai, subcontracting mein online.
options.D: In-house mein stitching hoti hai, subcontracting mein cutting.

questions.explanation: In-house production ka matlab hai ki saara production apni factory premises mein hota hai, jabki subcontracting mein kuch ya saara production kisi aur factory se karwaya jata hai.

questions.question: Garment manufacturing mein 'Finishing' process mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Ironing, folding, packing, aur final inspection.
options.C: Stitching operations.

questions.explanation: Finishing stage mein garment ko final look diya jata hai jismein pressing, tagging, folding aur packing jaise steps hote hain.

questions.question: 'Production File' mein kaun si important information hoti hai?

options.B: Tech Pack, approved samples, BOM, T&A, aur other production-related documents.
options.C: Factory ka financial statement.

questions.explanation: Production file mein order se related saari critical information hoti hai jo production process ke liye reference point ka kaam karti hai.

questions.question: Agar stitching mein koi defect repeatedly aa raha hai, toh merchandiser ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Defect ko ignore kar dena chahiye.
options.B: Production team ke saath discuss kare, root cause identify kare aur corrective action implement kare.
options.C: Buyer ko blame karna chahiye.
options.D: Defective garments ko ship kar dena chahiye.

questions.explanation: Repeated defects ko address karna bahut zaroori hai. Merchandiser ko production aur QC teams ke saath milkar solution nikalna chahiye.

questions.question: Garment production mein 'SMV (Standard Minute Value)' ka kya use hai?

options.A: Stitching machine ki speed measure karna.
options.B: Ek garment banane mein kitna standard time lagna chahiye, yeh calculate karna.
options.C: Workers ki lunch break ka time measure karna.

questions.explanation: SMV ek scientific method hai jo ek garment banane mein lagne wale standard time ko determine karta hai, jo costing, capacity planning aur line balancing ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Pre-production meeting (PPM) kyon organize ki jaati hai?

options.A: Workers ko party dene ke liye.
options.B: Production start hone se pehle saari teams (merchandising, production, QC) ko order details aur requirements discuss karne ke liye.
options.C: Buyer ke saath tea party karne ke liye.
options.D: Shipping plan finalize karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: PPM mein saari relevant departments order ki requirements, potential challenges aur solutions ko discuss karte hain taaki production smooth ho.

questions.question: Fabric Inspection Department ka main kaam kya hai?

options.B: Fabric mein defects jaise holes, stains, color variations check karna.
options.C: Fabric ko dye karna.

questions.explanation: Fabric Inspection incoming fabric rolls ko check karta hai taaki koi defected fabric production mein na jaye.

questions.question: Garment production mein 'Bundling' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Cut components ko size aur color ke according small bundles mein organize karna stitching ke liye.
options.C: Workers ko bundle karna.

questions.explanation: Bundling cut garment pieces ko manageable units mein organize karta hai taaki stitching line par easy flow aur control ho sake.

questions.question: Agar factory mein power cut ho jaye production ke dauran, toh merchandiser ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Wait karna chahiye jab tak power na aa jaye.
options.B: Backup power solutions (genset) check kare aur buyer ko potential delay ke baare mein inform kare.
options.C: Workers ko ghar bhej dena chahiye.

questions.explanation: Unexpected events jaise power cuts ko handle karna merchandiser ki problem-solving ability ka part hai. Backup plans aur timely communication zaroori hai.

questions.question: Garment production mein 'Pressing/Ironing' ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Garment ko smooth karna, wrinkles hatana aur final finished look dena.
options.C: Garment ko wet karna.

questions.explanation: Pressing/Ironing finished garment ko polished aur wrinkle-free look deta hai, jo buyer approval ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Garment industry mein 'AQL (Acceptable Quality Limit)' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Maximum defects jo ek garment mein ho sakte hain.
options.B: Maximum acceptable number of defective units in a given sample size.
options.C: Minimum quantity jo buyer order kar sakta hai.
options.D: Minimum salary jo worker ko milni chahiye.

questions.explanation: AQL ek statistical tool hai jo buyer aur supplier ke beech agreed quality level ko define karta hai, kitne defects acceptable hain ek lot mein.

questions.question: Quality Control (QC) Department 'In-line Inspection' kyon karta hai?

options.B: Production line ke dauran stitching operations ko monitor karna aur defects ko early stage mein identify karna.
options.C: Packing ke baad.

questions.explanation: In-line Inspection ongoing production ko monitor karta hai taaki defects ko source par hi detect aur rectify kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Garment mein 'Major Defect' ka kya example hai?

options.B: Missing button ya open seam jo garment ki functionality ko affect kare.
options.C: Slightly loose button.
options.D: Chhota sa stain jo easily remove ho jaye.

questions.explanation: Major defect woh hota hai jo garment ki sellability, functionality ya appearance ko significantly affect kare.

questions.question: 'Final Random Inspection (FRI)' kyon ki jaati hai?

options.B: Bulk production ke beech mein.
options.C: Goods pack hone ke baad, shipment se pehle final quality check ke liye.

questions.explanation: FRI ek final check hai jo goods ke pack hone ke baad kiya jata hai taaki buyer ko bhejne se pehle quality standards meet ho rahe hain ya nahi, yeh confirm kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Social Compliance Audit mein kin cheezon ko check kiya jata hai?

options.B: Working conditions, wages, working hours, child labour, health aur safety standards.
options.C: Fabric ka colorfastness.

questions.explanation: Social Compliance Audit factory ke ethical aur legal labour practices ko evaluate karta hai.

questions.question: Garment export mein 'Colorfastness Test' kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Fabric ki strength check karne ke liye.
options.B: Yeh check karne ke liye ki fabric ka color wash karne par ya exposure par fade ya transfer toh nahi hota.
options.C: Fabric ki thickness check karne ke liye.
options.D: Fabric ki weight check karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Colorfastness test garment ki durability aur appearance ko maintain karne ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: 'Minor Defect' ka kya example hai garment mein?

options.B: Ek chhota loose thread jo easily trim ho sakta hai.
options.C: Wrong size label.

questions.explanation: Minor defect woh hota hai jo garment ki overall appearance ya functionality ko significantly affect nahi karta.

questions.question: Environmental Compliance mein kis cheez par focus kiya jata hai?

options.A: Factory ke surrounding trees ki sankhya.
options.B: Water usage, waste management, energy consumption aur harmful chemicals ka use.
options.C: Workers ke liye green uniform.

questions.explanation: Environmental Compliance factory ke operations ke environmental impact ko manage aur minimize karne par concentrate karta hai.

questions.question: Agar QC inspection mein bahut zyada defects milte hain, toh merchandiser ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Production ko hold kare, root cause analyze kare, rectification plan banaye aur buyer ko inform kare.
options.C: QC team ko suspend kar dena chahiye.

questions.explanation: High defect rates par immediate action lena zaroori hai. Production ko stop karna, problem solve karna aur buyer ko transparently update karna sahi approach hai.

questions.question: 'Shrinkage Test' kyon kiya jata hai garment industry mein?

options.A: Fabric ko shrink karne ke liye.
options.B: Yeh predict karne ke liye ki garment wash ke baad kitna shrink hoga.
options.C: Fabric ki thickness measure karne ke liye.
options.D: Fabric ki weight measure karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Shrinkage test garment ke dimensional stability ko ensure karta hai, taaki consumer ko size issue na ho wash ke baad.

questions.question: Garment export mein 'OEKO-TEX Standard 100' certification ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Garment mein koi harmful substance nahi hai aur yeh human-ecological requirements ko meet karta hai.
options.C: Garment 100 baar wash kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.explanation: OEKO-TEX Standard 100 ek independent certification system hai jo textile products ke harmful substances se free hone ko ensure karta hai.

questions.question: 'Pre-shipment Inspection (PSI)' kyon important hai?

options.A: Buyer ko extra charge karne ke liye.
options.B: Yeh verify karne ke liye ki final goods buyer ke specifications aur quality standards ko meet karte hain shipment se pehle.
options.C: Factory mein workers ki efficiency check karne ke liye.
options.D: Shipping company ko impress karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: PSI final chance hota hai goods ko inspect karne ka taaki koi issue ho toh shipment se pehle resolve ho sake.

questions.question: Garment export mein 'BSCI (Business Social Compliance Initiative)' certification ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Global supply chain mein social compliance aur ethical business practices promote karna.
options.C: Production cost kam karna.

questions.explanation: BSCI ek leading supply chain management system hai jo companies ko social compliance improve karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Agar buyer specific 'Labeling Requirements' demand karta hai, toh merchandiser ko kya ensure karna chahiye?

options.B: Saare required labels (care, content, size, country of origin) correct format aur placement mein ho.
options.C: Labels visible na ho.

questions.explanation: Labeling requirements compliance aur consumer information ke liye critical hote hain. Har detail ko accurately follow karna chahiye.

questions.question: Quality control mein 'Defect Classification' kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf defects ko count karne ke liye.
options.B: Defects ko unki severity ke according categorize karna (minor, major, critical) taaki appropriate action liya ja sake.
options.C: Defects ko ignore karne ke liye.
options.D: Defects ko hide karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Defect classification se QC team aur production team ko defects ki seriousness ka pata chalta hai aur corrective actions prioritize kiye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Garment export mein 'REACH Compliance' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Products easy to reach hone chahiye.
options.B: European Union regulation jo chemicals ke registration, evaluation, authorization aur restriction ko deal karta hai.
options.C: Products ki height reachability.
options.D: Products ko remote areas tak pahunchana.

questions.explanation: REACH (Registration, Evaluation, Authorisation and Restriction of Chemicals) ek EU regulation hai jo human health aur environment ko chemical risks se protect karta hai.

questions.question: Agar buyer 'Third-Party Inspection' ki demand karta hai, toh merchandiser ka kya role hota hai?

options.B: Inspector ke saath coordination karna, required documents provide karna aur inspection process ko facilitate karna.
options.C: Inspector ko bribes dena.
options.D: Inspection ke results ko change karna.

questions.explanation: Third-party inspection mein merchandiser ko inspector ke saath fully cooperate karna chahiye taaki inspection smoothly ho sake aur transparency maintain ho.

questions.question: 'Incoterms' ka kya role hai international trade mein?

options.B: Buyer aur seller ke beech responsibilities, costs aur risks ko define karna for delivery of goods.
options.C: International phone calls ke liye terms.

questions.explanation: Incoterms (International Commercial Terms) international sales contracts mein parties ki responsibilities ko clearly outline karte hain.

questions.question: FOB (Free On Board) Incoterm ke under, goods port par load hone ke baad risk ki responsibility kiski hoti hai?

options.B: Buyer ki.
options.C: Shipping company ki.

questions.explanation: FOB mein, goods vessel par load hone ke baad saare risks aur costs buyer ko transfer ho jaate hain.

questions.question: 'Bill of Lading (B/L)' ka kya use hai sea shipment mein?

options.B: Yeh goods ki ownership ka proof hai, ek receipt for shipment aur ek contract of carriage.
options.C: Yeh ek letter of apology hai.

questions.explanation: Bill of Lading ek crucial shipping document hai jo goods ki receipt aur title ko represent karta hai.

questions.question: Garment export mein 'Letter of Credit (LC)' payment term kyon popular hai?

options.A: Yeh seller ko koi security nahi deta.
options.B: Yeh buyer aur seller dono ko security provide karta hai ki payment aur goods delivery specified conditions ke according hogi.
options.C: Yeh sirf buyer ke liye faydemand hai.
options.D: Yeh payment mein delay karta hai.

questions.explanation: LC ek secure payment method hai jahan bank buyer ki taraf se seller ko payment guarantee karta hai, provided seller saare specified documents submit kare.

questions.question: Agar shipment 'DDP (Delivered Duty Paid)' terms par hai, toh seller ki kya responsibility hoti hai?

options.B: Goods ko buyer ke destination tak deliver karna, saare duties aur taxes pay karke.
options.C: Sirf freight cost pay karna.
options.D: Buyer ko goods pick-up karne ke liye kehna.

questions.explanation: DDP seller par maximum responsibility dalta hai, jismein buyer ke destination tak delivery, customs clearance aur saare duties/taxes shamil hain.

questions.question: 'Air Waybill (AWB)' ka kya use hai air shipment mein?

options.B: Yeh ek non-negotiable document hai jo air cargo ke liye receipt aur contract of carriage ka kaam karta hai.
options.C: Yeh ek weather report hai.
options.D: Yeh ek pilot ki diary hai.

questions.explanation: AWB ek critical document hai jo air freight ke liye Bill of Lading ki tarah kaam karta hai, lekin yeh non-negotiable hota hai.

questions.question: Customs clearance process mein 'Packing List' kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Yeh factory ka internal record hai.
options.B: Yeh har carton mein goods ki detailed list provide karta hai, jismein quantity, weight aur dimensions shamil hote hain.
options.C: Yeh workers ki attendance record hai.
options.D: Yeh buyer ke favorite products ki list hai.

questions.explanation: Packing List customs officials ko goods ko verify karne aur duty calculation mein help karta hai.

questions.question: 'Freight Forwarder' ka kya role hai logistics mein?

options.B: Shipper aur carrier ke beech intermediary ka kaam karna, shipment arrangements ko manage karna.
options.C: Goods ko inspect karna.

questions.explanation: Freight forwarder logistics expert hota hai jo cargo movement, customs clearance aur documentation ko facilitate karta hai.

questions.question: Payment terms mein 'Advance T/T (Telegraphic Transfer)' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Buyer goods milne ke baad pay karta hai.
options.B: Buyer shipment se pehle poori ya kuch payment electronic transfer ke through karta hai.
options.C: Payment cheque se hoti hai.
options.D: Payment credit card se hoti hai.

questions.explanation: Advance T/T seller ke liye sabse secure payment method hai kyuki payment shipment se pehle receive ho jaati hai.

questions.question: 'Certificate of Origin' kyon zaroori hai export documentation mein?

options.A: Yeh buyer ka birth certificate hai.
options.B: Yeh goods ki country of manufacture ko certify karta hai, jo customs duties aur trade agreements ke liye important hai.
options.C: Yeh shipping company ka certificate hai.

questions.explanation: Certificate of Origin goods ki original country ko specify karta hai, jo preferential tariffs aur import restrictions ke liye vital hai.

questions.question: Agar buyer 'CIF (Cost, Insurance, and Freight)' terms par order place karta hai, toh seller ki responsibilities kya hoti hain?

options.A: Sirf goods ko factory se nikalna.
options.B: Goods ko port of destination tak deliver karna, freight aur insurance pay karke.
options.C: Buyer ke warehouse tak goods deliver karna.

questions.explanation: CIF mein seller goods ko designated port of destination tak deliver karne ke liye freight aur insurance pay karta hai, lekin risk goods vessel par load hone ke baad buyer ko transfer ho jata hai.

questions.question: Logistics mein 'Consolidation' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Goods ko ek jagah par destroy karna.
options.B: Multiple small shipments ko ek larger shipment mein combine karna taaki cost save ho.
options.C: Goods ko separate karna.

questions.explanation: Consolidation small shipments ke liye cost-effective solution hai, jismein freight charges reduce ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Agar shipment mein koi damage hota hai transit ke dauran, toh merchandiser ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Damage ko ignore kar dena chahiye.
options.B: Immediately buyer aur shipping company ko inform kare, insurance claim process kare.
options.C: Damage ke liye buyer ko blame karna chahiye.
options.D: Goods ko wapas factory bula lena chahiye.

questions.explanation: Transit damage ek serious issue hai jismein prompt communication aur insurance claim process karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Payment terms mein 'CAD (Cash Against Documents)' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Buyer ko credit diya jata hai.
options.B: Buyer bank ke through documents receive karne par payment karta hai.
options.C: Buyer ko documents free mein milte hain.
options.D: Buyer ko cash mein payment karni hoti hai.

questions.explanation: CAD mein buyer ko shipping documents tabhi milte hain jab woh bank ko payment kar deta hai, jo seller ke liye ek moderate level ki security provide karta hai.

questions.question: Export documentation mein 'Shipping Bill' ka kya importance hai?

options.A: Yeh goods ki quality certify karta hai.
options.B: Yeh customs clearance ke liye required document hai jo exporter dwara submit kiya jata hai.
options.C: Yeh buyer ka order confirmation hai.
options.D: Yeh freight charges ka bill hai.

questions.explanation: Shipping Bill ek declaration hai jo exporter customs authority ko deta hai, jismein goods ki detailed information hoti hai jo export kiye ja rahe hain.

questions.question: Agar customs clearance mein delay ho, toh merchandiser ko kya action lena chahiye?

options.B: Freight forwarder aur customs agent ke saath coordinate kare, reason identify kare aur buyer ko update kare.
options.C: Customs officials ko blame karna chahiye.
options.D: Goods ko wapas factory bula lena chahiye.

questions.explanation: Customs delays ko proactively manage karna aur buyer ko timely updates dena bahut important hai.

questions.question: Garment export mein 'Marine Insurance' kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf ships ko cover karne ke liye.
options.B: Goods ko transit ke dauran loss ya damage se protect karne ke liye.
options.C: Workers ko health insurance provide karne ke liye.
options.D: Factory ki building ko cover karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Marine insurance international shipments mein goods ko unexpected events (jaise theft, damage, natural calamities) se protect karta hai.

questions.question: Garment costing mein 'CMT' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Cost of Material and Trims.
options.C: Cut, Make, Trim - garment banane ki labour cost.

questions.explanation: CMT cost mein cutting, stitching aur trimming operations ki labour cost shamil hoti hai.

questions.question: Costing karte samay 'Fabric Cost' calculate karne ke liye kin factors ko consider kiya jata hai?

options.B: Fabric price per meter/yard, consumption per garment aur wastage percentage.
options.C: Fabric ka brand name.

questions.explanation: Fabric cost calculation mein fabric ki unit price, kitna fabric use hoga aur kitni wastage hogi, yeh sab important hain.

questions.question: 'Overhead Costs' mein kya shamil hota hai garment manufacturing mein?

options.B: Rent, utilities, salaries of non-production staff, depreciation jaise indirect expenses.
options.C: Sirf labour cost.

questions.explanation: Overhead costs woh expenses hote hain jo directly production se related nahi hote lekin factory ko run karne ke liye zaroori hote hain.

questions.question: Costing mein 'Profit Margin' kyon add kiya jata hai?

options.A: Sirf buyer ko extra charge karne ke liye.
options.B: Business ki profitability aur sustainability ensure karne ke liye.
options.C: Cost ko badhane ke liye.

questions.explanation: Profit margin business ko grow karne, investments karne aur unexpected expenses ko cover karne ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Agar buyer 'Target Price' deta hai jo production cost se kam hai, toh merchandiser ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Costing ko re-evaluate kare, value engineering options explore kare aur buyer ke saath negotiate kare.
options.C: Loss mein order accept kar lena chahiye.
options.D: Apni salary kam kar deni chahiye.

questions.explanation: Target price matching ek common challenge hai. Merchandiser ko creative solutions dhundhne hote hain jaise material substitutions, process improvements ya negotiation.

questions.question: 'Exchange Rate Fluctuation' ka costing par kya asar padta hai?

options.B: Imported raw materials aur export earnings ki value ko affect karta hai, jisse profitability change ho sakti hai.
options.C: Sirf domestic sales par asar padta hai.
options.D: Shipping time par asar padta hai.

questions.explanation: Exchange rate changes se raw material costs aur export revenue directly affect hote hain, jisse costing aur profitability mein variation aa sakta hai.

questions.question: Cost Sheet mein 'Trims Cost' calculate karte samay kin cheezon ko consider kiya jata hai?

options.B: Required trims (buttons, zippers, labels) ki quantity aur unki unit price.
options.C: Trims ka color.
options.D: Trims supplier ki factory ka size.

questions.explanation: Trims cost mein har type ke trim ki required quantity aur uski per-unit cost ko multiply karke total cost nikali jaati hai.

questions.question: Negotiation ke dauran 'win-win situation' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Sirf buyer jeete.
options.C: Dono parties ko mutually beneficial outcome mile.

questions.explanation: Win-win negotiation mein dono parties ko apne goals achieve karne mein help milti hai, jisse long-term relationship maintain hota hai.

questions.question: Garment costing mein 'FOB Cost' mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Fabric, trims, CMT, overheads, profit, aur local transportation/documentation charges till port.
options.C: Buyer ke warehouse tak ka saara kharcha.

questions.explanation: FOB cost mein saare manufacturing expenses, profit aur goods ko port of shipment tak deliver karne ke kharche shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Agar buyer bulk quantity order karta hai, toh costing par kya asar padta hai?

options.A: Cost per unit badh jaati hai.
options.B: Cost per unit kam ho jaati hai due to economies of scale.
options.C: Cost per unit same rehti hai.
options.D: Costing process aur complex ho jaati hai.

questions.explanation: Bulk orders mein suppliers generally better prices offer karte hain aur fixed costs multiple units par spread ho jaate hain, jisse per-unit cost kam ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Costing mein 'contingency' kyon rakhi jaati hai?

options.B: Unexpected expenses ya risks ko cover karne ke liye.
options.C: Buyer ko confuse karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Contingency fund unexpected events jaise material price hike, production issues ya shipping delays ke liye buffer provide karta hai.

questions.question: Pricing strategy mein 'Cost-Plus Pricing' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Buyer ke price ke according price fix karna.
options.B: Total cost calculate karke usme ek fixed percentage ka profit margin add karna.
options.C: Competitors ki price ko copy karna.

questions.explanation: Cost-Plus Pricing ek straightforward method hai jismein cost par ek predefined profit percentage add kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Agar buyer 'Ex-Factory Price' mangta hai, toh ismein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Sirf goods ki manufacturing cost, factory gate par delivery tak.
options.C: Shipping aur insurance cost.

questions.explanation: Ex-Factory (EXW) price mein sirf manufacturing cost aur goods ko factory gate par available karwane tak ka kharcha shamil hota hai. Baaki saare costs aur risks buyer ke hote hain.

questions.question: Merchandiser ko costing ke liye 'historical data' ka use kyon karna chahiye?

options.A: Sirf purani baatein yaad karne ke liye.
options.B: Previous orders ki costing ko reference ke taur par use karna taaki accurate estimates banaye ja sake aur trends identify kiye ja sake.
options.C: Nayi costing methods avoid karne ke liye.
options.D: Buyer ko impress karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Historical data costing accuracy ko improve karta hai, past performance se seekhne ka mauka deta hai aur future pricing decisions mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Garment export mein 'Proforma Costing' ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Buyer ko order confirmation se pehle ek estimated cost provide karna.
options.C: Production start hone ke baad cost calculate karna.
options.D: Factory ka budget banane ke liye.

questions.explanation: Proforma Costing buyer ko initial quotation provide karta hai jisse woh order place karne ka decision le sake.
